title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG The Nerv White Paper
display_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG The Nerv White Paper
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Aug 19, 2009 4:37 am I'd really like to know more about this. It doesn't even have a page on the EvaGeeks wiki, but according to Mr. Horn, it contains the freaking Dead Sea Scrolls . I doubt they're that "official" or anything, but I'd really like to know what's inside. And, erm... know more about Iblis and Barakijal. And the Sixth Children, Maria Vincennes. This thing's available from Amazon for under $50 , so somebody buy it. Buy the heck out of it. EDIT: No, wait. Don't buy the heck out of that one. Buy the heck out of THIS one: only $34 and with free shipping, even!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 19, 2009 6:48 am I own it. It doesn't have a page on the Wiki because that's one of three thousand things I still need to get around to. If there are Dead Sea Scrolls in there, they've managed to completely escape my notice so far.

[]:             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Sun Sep 27, 2009 3:57 pm Is this like a video game or something? sounds interesting!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 27, 2009 4:12 pm It's a traditional pencil, paper and (presumably) funny-shaped dice RPG -- improvisational radio theatre or improvisational puppet theatre according to taste.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Sep 27, 2009 4:51 pm I've been keeping an eye out for this one, but first, is there an English version of it?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Sep 28, 2009 9:17 pm There's no English version. In the back of the Viz Eva novels it says it's a "rare" book. I bought it on ebay for under $10 a year or two ago. It's pretty cool. I just with I could read it so I could play it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 05, 2011 2:11 am Bumping this old thread. I randomly came across some scans of this book so I did a bunch of research and created the page on the wiki. http://wiki.evageeks.org/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_RPG:_The_Nerv_White_Paper So far, there's not much there, just some scans and bits about what's in the book. Anyone care to expand it?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Jan 05, 2011 2:04 pm I know that Eva Monkey has a copy now... because I sold it to him.

[]:             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Sat Jun 21, 2014 5:36 am Has there been any progress in translating this thing, or at least finding translations that were done by someone off-site? The character of Maria Vincennes intrigues me.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Sat Apr 30, 2016 6:27 am On a different note, I'd like to draw your attention to a glaring mistake in the transliteration of Vincennes' first name. The katakana in this image are actually pronounced as Marii rather than Maria , therefore her name is not "Mari a " -- or Mari/Mary, for that matter, since that one has a short i sound at the end, and the latter is typically rendered as Meari(i) in Japanese -- but rather " Marie ". So... Is there anything required to do before the name gets changed on the wiki?
summary: []: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Nerv White Paper             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Aug 19, 2009 4:37 am I'd really like to know more about this. It doesn't even have a page on the EvaGeeks wiki, but according to Mr. Horn, it contains the freaking Dead Sea Scrolls . I doubt they're that "official" or anything, but I'd really like to know what's inside. And, erm... know more about Iblis and Barakijal.
